title: obistherm - OBIS occurrence data matched with monthly sea temperature
description: obistherm is a dataset that links marine species occurrence records from OBIS with sea surface temperature (SST) data from four satellite products: GLORYS, CoralTemp, MUR, and OSTIA. Each occurrence record is matched to the temperature value at its location and date.
